Sift
FeaturesDemoPrivacy
Free & Open Source

IMDB ratings on your
streaming apps

Sift adds IMDB ratings next to movies and TV shows on Netflix, Prime Video, and more. Choose what to watch faster.

Add to ChromeAdd to EdgeAdd to FirefoxView on GitHub

See it in action

Watch how Sift seamlessly adds IMDB ratings to your favorite streaming platforms

Simple. Fast. Transparent.

Everything you need to make better viewing decisions

Instant Ratings

IMDB ratings appear directly next to movie and TV show tiles as you browse. No extra clicks needed.

Quick Access to IMDB

Click any rating to open the full IMDB page in a new tab for reviews, cast info, and more.

Open Source

Fully transparent codebase. Review it, contribute to it, or fork it on GitHub.

Source code

Privacy First

No user data collected by default. Opt-in to error reporting if you choose.

Learn more

Works where you watch

Download for your browser

Available on all major browsers. Install in seconds.

Add to ChromeAdd to EdgeAdd to Firefox
Sift

IMDB ratings powered by the OMDB API. Consider supporting the project!

Source Code
